title: The Appearance Of The Blue Noah
Botab Island
overview: Colin and his surviving classmates make it to the N-1 island where they find the mysterious Thundersub.

title: Rescue Operation In The Coral Sea
overview: After launching the Thundersub, the thunder-team find a downed Cuban fighter pilot then launch their first attack on the Gotham.

title: Gotham's Terraforming Plan
overview: While heading for Bermuda, Captain Noah and the thunder team discover the death force have enslaved the remaining human survivors of the Gotham invasion and they plan a rescue mission.

title: Adam and Eve of the South Seas
overview: Colin and Domingo break into the death force base to rescue the enslaved human survivors.

title: Attack That Tower!
overview: Colin and Capilla escape from the island with their lives before being rescued by the Tempest Junior.

title: Hurricane of Love and Anger
overview: Kapilla and Tara try to appeal to Captain Noah to return them to Gypsy Atol.

title: Detour of Decision
overview: While on their way to the Gilbert islands, the Thunder team discover the death force has constructed an elevator that can reach as high as the terror star.

title: Vow to Tomorrow
overview: Captain Noah and the Thundersub team devise a plan to attack the Deathforces orbital elevator.

title: Tara, Her Love
overview: The Thundersub returns to the gypsy atoll island to aid Kapila and Tara after receiving an S.O.S from them.

title: Crimson Tide Hell of Fear
overview: In an attempt to make repairs to the Thundersub after the attack on the death force orbit elevator, Captain Noah and the thunder team change course to Antarctica.

title: Thrilling! The Dummy Strategy
overview: After arriving at Antarctica, the Thunder team take refuge inside an iceberg for much needed recovery.

title: Rush Into The Whirlpool
overview: The Thundersub crew becomes stricken with food poisoning caused by a red tide. deployed by the death force and Anna and Sarah both try to find the antidote.

title: Showdown in the Abyss
overview: The Thundersub gets entangled in an anti submarine Net set up by the death force but Anna comes up with an escape plan to get the Thundersub out.

title: 48 Hours in Bermuda
overview: Colin assumes command of the Tempest Jr after Skipper Grogen sacrifices himself to save tempest team from incoming Danger.

title: Earth, Forever!
overview: After its completion for space travel, the Thundersub team begin their mission to combat the death force from outer space.
